notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 2–0 · Pete Alonso doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Taylor Ward scores. Dylan Beavers scores. Pete Alonso to 3rd. Pete Alonso advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Kyle Stowers.

notableEvents.label: Throwing picked off
notableEvents.detail: Top 5 · 7–4 · Throwing error by pitcher Anthony Bender on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill flies out sharply to center fielder Jakob Marsee.

notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman singles on a line drive to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Taylor Ward scores. Pete Alonso to 2nd.
